title: Increased Head Drops
description: An additional way to get Creeper, Zombie, Skeleton, and Player head drops
body:
Increased Head Drops

Creepers, Zombies, Skeletons, and Piglins gain a rare chance to drop their heads when killed by players

Features

  • Zombie, Skeleton, and Creeper heads have a rare chance of being dropped when killed by a player
  • Drops are based on the same rate as Wither Skeleton Skulls
  • Alternative Download for compatibility with Renewable Pigstep
  • See Player Head Drops for head drops from players
